ddls:
CREATE TABLE "academic_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic year (e.g., 2012-13) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_counts" (
  "count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution count record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year */,
  "total_institutions" INTEGER /* Total number of institutions */,
  "new_institutions" INTEGER /* Number of new institutions */,
  "closed_institutions" INTEGER /* Number of closed institutions */,
  "reopened_institutions" INTEGER /* Number of institutions that were reopened */,
  "institutions_with_expansion" INTEGER /* Number of institutions that expanded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institution_counts_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student enrollment record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year */,
  "total_intake" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "girls_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of girls enrolled */,
  "boys_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of boys enrolled */,
  "international_students" INTEGER /* Number of international students enrolled */,
  "part_time_students" INTEGER /* Number of part-time students enrolled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_enrollment_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_strength" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty strength record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year */,
  "total_faculty" INTEGER /* Total number of faculty members */,
  "full_time_faculty" INTEGER /* Number of full-time faculty members */,
  "part_time_faculty" INTEGER /* Number of part-time faculty members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_strength_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student performance record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year */,
  "students_passed" INTEGER /* Number of students who passed */,
  "students_with_honors" INTEGER /* Number of students who passed with honors */,
  "students_with_failures" INTEGER /* Number of students who failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "placement_statistics" (
  "placement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each placement statistics record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year */,
  "total_placements" INTEGER /* Total number of placements */,
  "students_placed_internationally" INTEGER /* Number of students placed in international positions */,
  "average_salary" TEXT /* Average salary of placed students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("placement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placement_statistics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_details" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the institution is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the institution is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the institution is located */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., public, private) */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was established */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the institution */,
  "number_of_programs" INTEGER /* Number of academic programs offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_yearly_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution's yearly data record */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year */,
  "total_intake" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "total_faculty" INTEGER /* Total number of faculty members */,
  "students_passed" INTEGER /* Number of students who passed */,
  "international_intake" INTEGER /* Number of international students enrolled */,
  "part_time_intake" INTEGER /* Number of part-time students enrolled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institution_yearly_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institution_yearly_data_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institution_details ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, policymaker) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES institution_yearly_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, analyst, policymaker) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
